mean_en: a deep round container used for cooking things in; a container made of glass, clay or plastic, used for storing food in; (especially in compounds) a container of various kinds, made for a particular purpose; a bowl, etc. that is made by a potter
sentence: He could hear the pot bubbling on the stove.
sentence_trans: 他能听到炉子上的锅冒泡的声音。
